source_pr.title: *: add clustered index info in `show index from` stmt
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Problem Summary: support show index's clustered property in `show index from tbl` stmt ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed, How it Works: add `Clustered` column to `show index from tbl`'s result ### Related changes - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch ### Check List Tests - Unit test Side effects - n/a ### Release note - n/a --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/23329)

symptoms: result, err = s.execQuery(tk, "select key_name, clustered from information_schema.tidb_indexes where table_name = 'tr' order by key_name") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
failure_signature: result, err = s.execQuery(tk, "select key_name, clustered from information_schema.tidb_indexes where table_name = 'tr' order by key_name") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: result, err = s.execQuery(tk, "select key_name, clustered from information_schema.tidb_indexes where table_name = 'tr' order by key_name") (ddl/db_change_test.go).
fix_pattern: result, err = s.execQuery(tk, "select key_name, clustered from information_schema.tidb_indexes where table_name = 'tr' order by key_name") (ddl/db_change_test.go)
